Today, AgentKey became the #1 Product of the Day on Product Hunt 🐈

It's been an exciting (and exhausting) launch day...

Here are my top 5 takeaways:

1. Be present in the comments. Every comment… | Luki Song
results.content:
4. Don't bullshit!!
If your product doesn't have a feature yet, just say it. People appreciate honesty far more than exaggerated promises. Authenticity builds trust, and trust is what turns curious visitors into long-term users.
5. Teamwork makes the dream work.
AgentKey is incredibly lucky to have such an amazing team. On launch day, everyone rolled up their sleeves, jumped into the comments, answered questions, fixed issues, shared updates, and did whatever was needed.
If you haven't tried AgentKey yet, now it's your turn.
👉 agentkey.app/@lukisong
I'd love to hear what you build with it and what you think.
A huge thank you to everyone who supported AgentKey today. We couldn't have done it without you. ❤️ [...] Today, AgentKey became the #1 Product of the Day on Product Hunt 🐈
It's been an exciting (and exhausting) launch day...
Here are my top 5 takeaways:
1. Be present in the comments. Every comment is an opportunity to start a conversation. Reply quickly, ask follow-up questions, and make people feel heard.
2. Focus on quality supporters. The best support came from people who were genuinely curious or understand our product: users, partners, friends, and fellow builders. Authentic engagement always wins.
3. Tell your story, not just your features. People don't only support products. They support founders, teams, and missions. Share why you built it, what problem you're solving, and the journey behind it.
4. Don't bullshit!! [...] graphical user interface, text

## About AgentKey — Agent Access Managementon Product Hunt

“Access governance for AI agents. Free.”

AgentKey — Agent Access Managementwas submitted on Product Huntand earned 1upvotes and1comments,placing #64 on the daily leaderboard.Your AI agents need API keys for GitHub, Stripe, Linear — today they live scattered in env files with zero governance. AgentKey lets agents request access, humans approve once, credentials get vended encrypted and every call is audited. Built on Vercel. Free forever. [...] >   
> 📜 Every action is logged. Who requested what, who approved it, when credentials were fetched. One-click revoke.  
>   
> 🧠 AI-powered setup guides. Drop a docs URL, get step-by-step instructions for creating the right credential.  
>   
> 🔌 Framework-agnostic. Any agent that speaks HTTP works — Claude Code, Cursor, LangChain, CrewAI, custom.  
>   
> Stack: Next.js, Neon, Clerk, Upstash, deployed on @Vercel .  
>   
> Free forever at agentkey.dev, source-available (BSL 1.1 → Apache 2.0 in 2030), self-hostable.  
>   
> I'll be in the comments all day. Ask me anything — architecture, the "agent-driven catalog" bet, why I chose BSL over MIT, or what's broken. [...] Waiting for data. Loading

results.title: AgentKey: One-stop live data marketplace for your agent
results.content:
Life and travel: weather, maps, trip planning, and more It already plugs into 20+ of the agents people actually use, including Claude, Codex, Openclaw, WorkBuddy and Cursor. And because everything sits behind one marketplace, if a provider has a bad day your agent can fall back to another source and keep running. We really believe agents are about to bloom into a huge, messy, wonderful ecosystem. What excites me most is that people can finally hand their agents the real, complicated work, not just the basic stuff, and actually trust it to get done. That's most of why we're launching here. It's free to start, no card needed. Please go try to break it and tell me what's missing. I'll be in the comments all day. [...] 3. Upstream APIs are flaky.

Providers rate-limit, degrade, and sometimes just die. We do QoS-based traffic shaping and automatic failover between providers, so when one goes down the request quietly reroutes to a healthy one. Your agent gets an answer instead of a 503.  
  
I'm around all day, happy to answer anything about how this works under the hood.

Report

Luki

The biggest blocker I keep seeing is that nobody wants to spend weeks juggling multiple API signups, keys, and renewals just to launch one feature.

results.content:
# Connect Agents to the World

AgentKey - One-stop live data marketplace for your agent | Product Hunt

One key to unlock agent superpowers:  
search, scrape, social media, finance, crypto and more.

Try it for free

Watch the intro  Coming soon

   

5,000+ people are already using AgentKey

# What Product Manager Can Do with Agentkey

Watch your agent find live data, connect multiple sources, and deliver answers you can use.

YOUR AGENT       

Search Reddit and X for discussions about Strava subscription from the last 90 days. Identify the most common user complaints, requested features, pricing objections, and workflows users say they still solve with other apps.

## Giving agents the power to act [...] What can my agent do with AgentKey? −

Everyday research: what people say on X or Reddit, how a product is reviewed, what a long article says, token prices, GitHub readme summaries — the gaps native “browse the web” often misses. One AgentKey covers those fetches so you are not opening ten vendor sites yourself.

Do I need to write any code? +

No. Create an account, paste the install command from our Quick Install, and let the agent walk through the prompts. If you can copy and paste, you are qualified.

How much does it cost? +

Pick a plan — Lite, Pro, or Max — for a monthly credit balance that works across every service. Need more? Top up extra credits anytime. One subscription, no per-API bills.

Which platforms does it work with? + [...] chainbase.rpc × 658 $0.80

One subscription, one balance

No surprise caps or overages

Keeps working

When a data source has a bad day, we move the request to another route. Your chat keeps going — you do not need to debug providers.

AGENTKEY ROUTER

Tavily

Active

→ Routing here

✕ Unavailable

Ready to take over

Install in one message

Paste the install line into Claude Code or similar — first run walks you through the key. No weekend project. If you already use developer tools, the same flow still applies.

results.title: AgentKey: Giving agents the power to act
results.content:
Jinja Reader

URL-to-markdown service from Jina AI that strips scripts and formatting, returning agents clean, readable page content via a single GET request.

ScrapeNinja

High-performance scraping API with rotating proxies and headless browser support. Ideal for agents extracting data from JavaScript-heavy or bot-protected pages.

Bright.cn

Enterprise proxy network with residential and datacenter IPs. Gives agents reliable, geo-targeted web access for scraping at scale without getting blocked.

X/Twitter

Real-time public conversation data from X. Ideal for agents monitoring trending topics, sentiment shifts, and breaking news as it unfolds.

Reddit [...] DexScreener

Real-time DEX trading data across 80+ blockchains. Built for agents monitoring on-chain price action, liquidity, and newly launched tokens as they emerge.

Coingecko

Independent crypto market data with deep token histories, exchange volumes, and DeFi metrics. Gives agents comprehensive market intelligence without relying on a single exchange.

Chainbase

On-chain data infrastructure for querying blockchain state, transactions, and protocol data. Ideal for agents that need structured, SQL-queryable access to raw blockchain activity.

You're on the list

Thanks for joining — we'll email you when AgentKey is ready.

CAPABILITIES

Why AgentKey

The only key your agent needs to access the entire digital world.

One Unified Key
